title: lupinus sulphureus subsp. subsaccatus
intro: Lupinus sulphureus subsp. subsaccatus, commonly known as the yellow bush lupine, is a flowering plant species in the genus Lupinus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lupinus sulphureus subsp. subsaccatus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Lupinus sulphureus subsp. subsaccatus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in herbal supplements.
